tasks.label: run-full-unbounded-cg-first
args: from config.settings import settings; settings._config['BACKTEST_ENABLED']=True; settings._config['BACKTEST_REQUIRE_TARGET_EXCHANGE']=False; settings._config['ENTRY_NOTIFICATIONS']=False; settings._config['EXIT_NOTIFICATIONS']=False; settings._config['NO_CHANGE_NOTIFICATIONS']=False; settings._config['BACKTEST_MAX_PARAM_COMBOS']=100; settings._config['BACKTEST_PARALLEL_WORKERS']=4; settings._config['BACKTEST_MAX_COINS_PER_RUN']=0; import main; main.run_scanner()
